title: Regolamenti dwar il-Pesta tal-Baqar
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/36.14/mlt, expression eli/sl/36.14/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: 18 ta’ April, 1947
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar ilPesta tal-Baqar.

provisions.title: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar ilPesta tal-Baqar
provisions.content: F’dawn ir-Regolamenti, G]awdex tfisser ukoll Kemmuna.

provisions.title: F’dawn ir-Regolamenti, G]awdex tfisser ukoll Kemmuna
provisions.content:
L-ifrat kollha g]andhom ikunu mlaqqmin kontra l-pesta
tal-baqar.

provisions.title: tal-baqar
provisions.content:
ll-va``in li jintu\a g]al dan it-tilqim g]andu jkun wie]ed
mill-va``ini li jkunu approvati mill-veterinarju tal-gvern.

provisions.title: mill-va``ini li jkunu approvati mill-veterinarju tal-gvern
provisions.content:
L-ifrat kollha li jitlaqqmu kontra l-pesta tal-baqar
g]andhom ikunu ttimbrati b’mod illi g]al quddiem ikunu jistg]u
jing]arfu.

provisions.title: jing]arfu
provisions.content:
F’ka\ ta’ mewt fost l-ifrat imlaqqma skond ir-regolament
4, jing]ata kumpens lis-sid kemm-il darba l-veterinarju tal-gvern
ikun sodisfatt illi l-mewt hi ri\ultat dirett tat-tilqima.

provisions.title: ikun sodisfatt illi l-mewt hi ri\ultat dirett tat-tilqima
provisions.content:
Il-kumpens ikun ikkalkolat hekk:

(a) il-valur kollu tas-suq tal-bhima ]ajja mnaqqas il-valur
tal-la]am jekk il-karkassa jing]ata permess biex
ting]ata b]ala ikel g]an-nies;

Titolu.
Tifsir.
Tlaqqim ta’ l-ifrat.
Sostitwit:
N.G. 293 ta’ l1947.
Va``in li g]andu
jintu\a.
Sostitwit:
N.G. 380 ta’ l1947.
L-ifrat imlaqqma
g]andhom ikunu
ttimbrati.
Mewt.

Kumpens.

(b) il-valur kollu tal-bhima ]ajja jekk ma jing]atax ilpermess biex ting]ata l-karkassa b]ala ikel g]an-nies.

provisions.title: Kumpens
provisions.content:
}att ma g]andu ibig] jew jixtri frat li ma kienux tlaqqmu
kontra l-pesta tal-baqar.

provisions.title: Kumpens
provisions.content:
L-ifrat kollha li jin[iebu minn barra g]andhom, meta jaslu,
jitlaqqmu kontra l-pesta tal-baqar, b’riskju u bi spejje\ tas-sid.

provisions.title: Kumpens
provisions.content:
L-ifrat impurtati li jkunu tlaqqmu g]all-pesta tal-baqar ma
g]andhomx jitwarrbu ming]ajr l-permess bil-miktub ming]and ilveterinarju tal-gvern li, qabel ma jo]ro[ dan il-permess, g]andu
jkun \gur li l-annimali saru immuni.

provisions.title: Kumpens
provisions.content:
Is-sidien jew in-nies li g]andhom frat fil-pussess tag]hom
g]andhom je]duhom fi`-`entri tat-tilqim kif u meta jkunu mitluba
biex jag]mlu hekk b’avvi\ [enerali ma]ru[ mill-veterinarju talgvern u ma]ru[ fil-Gazzetta tal-Gvern jew b’avvi\ spe`jali
mibg]ut lis-sid jew lil min ikollu frat fil-pussess tieg]u g]albiex lifrat jitlaqqmu kontra l-pesta tal-baqar.

Projbizzjoni li
jinbieg]u frat li ma
kienux tlaqqmu.
Frat li jin[iebu
minn barra.
Permess bilmiktub.

provisions.title: Malta
provisions.content:
}add ma g]andu j[orr jew i[ieg]el li jin[arru baqar,
mog]o\, ng]a[ jew ]nie\er minn Malta g]al G]awdex.

provisions.title: Malta
provisions.content:
}add ma g]andu j[orr jew i[ieg]el li jin[arru baqar minn
G]awdex g]al Malta:

I\da jista’ jing]ata permess bil-miktub ma]ru[ millveterinarju tal-gvern lil min irid i[orr jew i[ieg]el li jin[arru baqar
minn G]awdex g]al Malta g]albiex dawn il-baqar jinqatlu filbi``erija ta’ Malta:
I\da wkoll dan ir-regolament ma jg]oddx g]all-ifrat li
dwarhom wie]ed juri `ertitikat ta’ immunizzazzjoni kontra l-pesta
tal-baqar ma]ru[ mit-tabib veterinarju tal-gvern.
